title: Sātkhira Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sātkhira with a Z-Score of +3.86. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Sātkhira is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 12.5 GG and humidity at 76%. 
 The wind speed is relatively low at 11.9 km/h, which is exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high, highlighting the severity of the heat wave.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this critical heat wave.
